name: DiffSBDD
description: Generate or optimize small molecules in the binding pocket of a protein. Structure-based drug design using diffusion model.
capabilities: Generate or optimize small molecules in the binding pocket of a protein
Structure-based drug design using diffusion model

receptor_structure.description: Target protein structure in PDB format

reference_ligand.description: Reference ligand to define the binding pocket

smiles.description: SMILES string of seed molecule to optimize
